example_tasks: Mute noisy disk space alerts on staging server
Configure Sentry to ignore known deprecation warnings
Dismiss security warnings on legacy codebase
Disable email notifications for automated builds
Silence smoke detector low battery chirp
Add exception rule to firewall alert system
Turn off push notifications for social media apps
Ignore ESLint warnings in third-party libraries
Mute Slack channels during deep work session
Resolve and clear dashboard warning flags
Disable certificate expiration warnings for local dev
Whitelist internal IP addresses in intrusion detection system
poor_matches: Set up new server monitoring alerts
reasoning: The icon clearly represents the negation, silencing, or ignoring of a warning or alert. It is highly useful for specific technical tasks involving alert suppression, muting notifications, or dismissing non-critical warnings, though it is less applicable to general day-to-day tasks.
